DEVOTED-STRIKE_DEVOTED.title: Strike
DEVOTED-DEFEND_DEVOTED.title: Defend
DEVOTED-WOUND_CARE.title: Wound Care
DEVOTED-TEST_OF_FAITH.title: Test Of Faith
DEVOTED-DIVINE_HYMN.description:
Gain {CalculationBase:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional block equal to your [gold]Faith[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} total Block)|}
DEVOTED-DIVINE_HYMN.title: Hymn of Shelter
DEVOTED-RITUALISTIC_STRIKE.title: Ritualistic Strike
DEVOTED-FAITHFUL_DEFEND.title: Faithful Defend
DEVOTED-FLAGELLATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Attack already played this turn.
Gain {PenanceRagePower:diff()} '[gold]Penance - gain [blue]1[/blue] Vigor[/gold]' for each Attack already played this turn.{InCombat:\n(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
DEVOTED-FLAGELLATION.title: Flagellation
DEVOTED-ATONEMENT.description: When a [gold]Penance[/gold] effect triggers, heal 2 HP.
DEVOTED-ATONEMENT.title: Atonement
DEVOTED-JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
DEVOTED-CONVICTION.title: Conviction
DEVOTED-FANATIC_STRIKE.title: Fanatic Strike
DEVOTED-ZEALOUS_STRIKE.title: Zealous Strike
DEVOTED-GUIDING_LIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {PenanceDrawPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - draw [blue]1[/blue] additional cards next turn..
DEVOTED-GUIDING_LIGHT.title: Guiding Light
DEVOTED-MELTING_FORM.title: Melting Form
DEVOTED-RETRIBUTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - Deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to the attacker.
DEVOTED-RETRIBUTION.title: Verdict
DEVOTED-RIGHTEOUS_DEFENSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - Deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to the attacker.
DEVOTED-RIGHTEOUS_DEFENSE.title: Righteous Defense
DEVOTED-TEARS_OF_THE_FLAME.description:
Gain {PenanceEnergyPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
Take {HpLoss:diff()} Damage.
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-TEARS_OF_THE_FLAME.title: Tears Of The Flame
DEVOTED-SCOUR_AND_STOKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
Gain {PenanceRagePower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - gain [blue]1[/blue] Vigor.
DEVOTED-SCOUR_AND_STOKE.title: Scour and Stoke
DEVOTED-MORTIFICATION.description:
Take {Damage:diff()} Damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-MORTIFICATION.title: Mortification
DEVOTED-VOTIVE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times.
For the next two turns when playing a card that is a “Strike”; Add one [gold]Replay[/gold] to the played card, else take 5 damage.
DEVOTED-VOTIVE_STRIKE.title: Votive Strike
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_MIGHT.description:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
For the next two turns when playing an Attack card; Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], else lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_MIGHT.title: Vow Of Might
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_PEACE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
For the next two turns when playing a Skill card; Gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold], else lose 1 [gold]Zeal[/gold].
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_PEACE.title: Vow Of Peace
DEVOTED-CANDLE_LIGHT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {PenanceWaxedPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to the attacker.
DEVOTED-CANDLE_LIGHT.title: Candle Light
DEVOTED-CONTEMPLATION.description:
Draw cards equal to your current [gold]Faith[/gold].
Gain {DevotionPower:diff()} [gold]Devotion[/gold].
Lose {ZealPower:diff()} [gold]Zeal[/gold].
DEVOTED-CONTEMPLATION.title: Contemplation
DEVOTED-CRUSADE.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal {CrusadePower:diff()} additional damage and trigger all your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects when played.
DEVOTED-CRUSADE.title: Crusade
DEVOTED-BELL_STRIKE.title: Bell Strike
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_INNER_WRATH.description: When ever you play a card with [gold]Toll[/gold], gain {ChimeZealotryPower:diff()} [gold]Zeal[/gold] and lose {ChimeZealotryPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_INNER_WRATH.title: Bell of Wrath
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_FORESIGHT.description: When ever you play a card with [gold]Toll[/gold], draw {ChimeDrawPower:diff()} additional card next turn.
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_FORESIGHT.title: Bell of Foresight
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_PROTECTION.description: When ever you play a card with [gold]Toll[/gold], gain {ChimeBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_PROTECTION.title: Bell of Refuge
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_FAITH.description: When ever you play a card with [gold]Toll[/gold], gain {ChimeFaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_FAITH.title: Bell of Belief
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_DETACHMENT.description: When ever you play a card with [gold]Toll[/gold], apply {ChimeVulnPower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerability[/gold] to a random enemy.
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_DETACHMENT.title: Bell of Detachment
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_CALM_MIND.description: At the start of your turn, add a random “Bell” card into your hand.
DEVOTED-BELL_OF_CALM_MIND.title: Bell of Renewal
DEVOTED-SOUND_THE_BELLS.title: Sound the Bells
DEVOTED-PRAYING.title: Praying
DEVOTED-CONFESSION.description:
Take 1 Damage.
Gain {FaithGain:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-CONFESSION.title: Confession
DEVOTED-FLAMES_OF_PURIFICATION.descripti:
Take {HpLoss:diff()} Damage.
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - Deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to the attacker.
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-FLAMES_OF_PURIFICATION.title: Flames Of Purification
DEVOTED-RETALIATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - Deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to the attacker.
DEVOTED-RETALIATION.title: Spillover
DEVOTED-SANCTIFICATION.description:
Remove all [gold]Zeal[/gold] and [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {FaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] X+{Triggers:diff()} times, where X is the amount of [gold]Zeal[/gold] and [gold]Vigor[/gold] lost.
DEVOTED-SANCTIFICATION.title: Sanctification
DEVOTED-LITANY.title: Litany
DEVOTED-WELL_OF_FAITH.description:
Remove all [gold]Faith[/gold].
Gain {FaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] X+{Triggers:diff()} times, where X is the amount of [gold]Faith[/gold] lost.
DEVOTED-WELL_OF_FAITH.title: Well Of Faith
DEVOTED-WAXEN_KNELL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {PenanceWaxedPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to the attacker.
DEVOTED-WAXEN_KNELL.title: Waxen Knell
DEVOTED-SANCTIFIED_BLOW.title: Sanctified Blow
DEVOTED-FRANTIC_STRIKE.title: Frantic Strike
DEVOTED-DIVINE_STRENGTH.title: Divine Strength
DEVOTED-LATENT_SPARK.description:
Gain {PenanceEnergyPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
Gain {PenanceDrawPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - draw [blue]1[/blue] additional cards next turn.
DEVOTED-LATENT_SPARK.title: Latent Spark
DEVOTED-FEED_THE_WICK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {PenanceWaxedPower:diff()} [gold]Penance[/gold] - apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to the attacker.
[gold]Wax[/gold] 1 card.
DEVOTED-FEED_THE_WICK.title: Feed The Wick
DEVOTED-BURNING_LESSON.description:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage
DEVOTED-BURNING_LESSON.title: Burning Lesson
DEVOTED-HYMN_OF_ASH.description:
Deal {CalculationBase:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each Zeal.
DEVOTED-HYMN_OF_ASH.title: Hymn Of Ash
DEVOTED-CADENCE_OF_LIGHT.title: Cadence Of Light
DEVOTED-ZEALOUS_FURY.title: Zealous Fury
DEVOTED-WAX_COPY.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} card.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wax[/gold] copies of it into your hand.
DEVOTED-WAX_COPY.title: Twin Casting
DEVOTED-CANDLE_MAKING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Wax[/gold] 1 card from your Draw Pile.
DEVOTED-CANDLE_MAKING.title: Prepared Waxing
DEVOTED-WAX_ON.description:
[gold]Wax[/gold] your Hand.
For each card [gold]Waxed[/gold] this way, gain {FaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold]
DEVOTED-WAX_ON.title: Commit to Flame
DEVOTED-WAX_OFF.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL your [gold]Wax[/gold] cards.
For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
DEVOTED-WAX_OFF.title: Melt Away
DEVOTED-WICKLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
It gains [gold]Wax[/gold].
DEVOTED-WICKLASH.title: Wicklash
DEVOTED-RUSH_LIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
 Add [gold]Wax[/gold] to a random card in your hand.
DEVOTED-RUSH_LIGHT.title: Rush Light
DEVOTED-WAXEN_ECHO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For the next {WaxenStrikePower:diff()} turns, when you play a non-[gold]Wax[/gold] “Strike” card, add a [gold]Wax[/gold] copy that costs 0 to your hand.
DEVOTED-WAXEN_ECHO.title: Waxen Echo
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_ASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For the next two turns when playing an Attack card; Take 4 damage.
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_ASH.title: Vow Of Ash
DEVOTED-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
DEVOTED-CHAIN_LIGHTING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next [gold]Wax[/gold] card you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DEVOTED-CHAIN_LIGHTING.title: Chain Lighting
DEVOTED-TOLLING_HOUR.title: Tolling Hour
DEVOTED-CHOIR.description:
Add [gold]Toll[/gold] to a random card in each player's hand.
Chime effects now trigger when any player plays a [gold]/Toll[gold] card.
DEVOTED-CHOIR.title: Choir
